title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
summary_full: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
summary_public: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
